warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
10 x Inch Worms
10 I-Y-T-W
10 Leg Raise holding rig
Wrist Mobilisation
10 Air Squat
10 Ankle Rocks

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
AMRAP x 10
10 pistols
8 toes to bar
3 wall walks

gymnastics:
Tabata 20 seconds on - 10 seconds off x 4 mins (00:00)
Alternating Hollow and Arch Hold
Pistol Squat Progression
EMOM x 5 mins (4:00)
10 x DB Bulgarian Split Squats
EMOM x 5 mins (9:00)
5 Box Pistols (slow and controlled)
EMOM x 5 (14:00)
5 Eccentric Lower
Two Leg stand Up
EMOM x 5 (19:00)
Counterbalance Pistols - Small Plate
T2B Bar Progression
1-2 mins False Grip on bar - focus on Knuckles Up (24:00)
EMOM x 3 (26:00)
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3 (29:00)
Jump Into Hollow/Arch x 10
EMOM x 3 (32:00)
Bigger Beat Swing - Push Down on Bar
- Put Ball between feet - Reach Long in the Arch - Dont bend the knees
EMOM x 3 (35:00)
Knees to Chest - Aggressive & Pop - pause at the top
EMOM x 3 (38:00)
Beat Swing with Straight legs - to target
Aim for height without losing tension.
the goal is to chain them together

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today hammers quads and hip flexors; posterior chain work balances fatigue and prevents imbalance.

siri_text: Thursday's workout. Strength: Bulgarian Split Squat, 3 by 10. Gymnastics: Tabata 20 seconds on - 10 seconds off x 4 mins. Metcon: AMRAP: 10 pistols, 8 toes to bar, 3 wall walks. For hypertrophy, focus on back, hamstrings, rear delts.
